title: Way Eight For Dat Storm by The SnowFlowers
description: Exploring personal growth and overcoming obstacles.
lyrics: My dreams are clear, my mind's open Can't wait no more, it's beginning to blend Waiting for the stars to fall Fall Fall   My mind is so clear, my mind's open Can't wait no more, it's beginning to blend Waiting for the stars to fall Fall And what I know, holding me, trolling me, dosing me, imploring me to move on past Tensions and emotional streams, which are part of gamers' goal, dollars and percent Yeah, need assist, to leave behind loss, running time, rewind, being kind, circular design To remind all, one divine cause of perception, no deception, correlation, coexist Infantilation, love, noise, cuckoo, silver lining, playstation, like I'm spying on wine, like fly high Sands amp, like amphetamine, better than we should be, breathe a big sweep Like a newer guy, number 99, Mr. Chu's going on like Winter Joy Alibos, Terminator, Time Traveler, back to create me, and treat you better Waste of time, film rights, child, screw, best thing I've been to, all have blue Blue, give me zoo, cap a dick for my flute, dope it, and the fucking truth When I hit my heels Waiting for the stars to fall My mind is so clear, my mind is so clear Waiting for the sun to rise It's coming, someday, or they ain't It's coming, someday, or they ain't If you got it, that's what I want Waste of time, film rights, child, screw, best thing I've been to, all have blue Blue, give me zoo, cap a dick for my flute, dope it, and the fucking truth Baby, just move on You're too gone, you gotta move You just gotta move on You just gotta move on I'd take some better, be some better Put your vote down, man, do some clever Cause I don't know if there's gonna be a storm with or without you I'd rather you on the side of love I'd rather you on the side, one up above I'd rather you be spiritually in connection with us Do you agree? Yeah
